privileged_info_summary: The docker_oom_debugging task creates a synthetic OOM debugging scenario with a Python worker service. The project directory is /home/ga/projects/acme-worker-service. The container name is acme-worker with a Docker memory limit of 300MB (hard constraint). The application has a configurable MAX_ALLOCATION_MB environment variable (default 500MB, causing OOM). The safe allocation threshold is 250MB. Users must tune this parameter without increasing the Docker memory limit. Task passes at 70+ points: 40 for stability, 30 for config tuning (allocation ≤ 250MB), 30 for respecting the 300MB constraint. Admin credentials: user 'ga' with password 'password123' for environment access.
